files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections for December, covering Theology, Work and Business, Literature, and Social Service. Each lesson has clear boundaries with titles, content, and questions/problems sections. Note that there appears to be an article about Utah Farm Families at the end that may be part of Lesson VI or a separate piece.
